rules: NEVER use Inter, Roboto, Open Sans, or Lato for headings.
Use tight letter spacing (tracking-tight) for all headings > 32px.
Headings must not exceed text-4xl (fluid scaling clamp preferred).
Overlines and Labels MUST be Uppercase, text-xs, and wide spacing (tracking-[0.2em]).
Use JetBrains Mono for data points, tags, and entity extraction chips.
Dark-mode only. Use true greys (slate), NEVER pure black (#000000).
Use 1-2 vivid accent colors while keeping charts and surrounding UI muted.
NEVER use full-screen gradients or generic gloss. Flat, matte, and dense.

visual_enhancers.elevation: No drop shadows. Use background lightness steps (slate-950 -> slate-900 -> slate-800) and 1px border-slate-800 for elevation.
visual_enhancers.textures: Subtle grain overlay to reduce 'digital flatness'. Keep it extremely subtle.
visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Used exclusively for sticky headers (bg-slate-950/70 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-slate-800). No transparent dropdowns.

components.cards: Borderless or 1px subtle border. High-density rectangles. DO NOT overuse the standard Vercel-look card. Make it feel like a terminal.
components.charts: Recharts. Dark-first palettes. Bright, thin lines (stroke-width: 2) and highly translucent fills (opacity-20).
components.badges: Entity chips must be monospaced, tightly padded (px-2 py-0.5), with a subtle colored background (bg-slate-800 text-slate-300).
components.buttons: Pill-shaped or sharp rectangular (rounded-none or rounded-sm). No soft 8px radii. Use solid accent for primary, flat slate-800 for secondary.

grids_and_layouts.dashboard: High Density Grid (Mode B). grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4. Tight gaps (gap-4 or gap-6).
grids_and_layouts.split_pane: Side-by-side publisher perspective grids must use equal heights (h-full) and span full columns to create a tight, unbroken flow of data.
grids_and_layouts.spacing: Generous outer padding (p-6 to p-12) for layout breathing room, but dense inner spacing (p-3, p-4) for data readability inside cards.

motion.hover: Use background color shifts (bg-slate-900 to bg-slate-800) with specific transitions. NO scaling (no hover:scale-105).
motion.transitions: Use specific properties (transition-colors duration-200). DO NOT use 'transition: all'.

accessibility.contrast: Maintain WCAG AA minimum 4.5:1 for body text. Off-white (#e5e7eb) is preferred over pure white (#ffffff) to cut glare.
accessibility.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., data-testid='publisher-filter-btn').

image_urls.description: Printing machine - Use for 'Sources' page banner or background texture for bias profiles.
Piles of newspapers - Use for Story Detail fallback image or 'Home' trending topics section.
Abstract data dark - Use for 'Compare' or 'Search' empty states / placeholder graphics.

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement a dark-mode ONLY dashboard. Hardcode the dark theme classes and remove all dark: prefixes if necessary, or force dark mode on the root.
Install and use @phosphor-icons/react for all icons, suitable for dense data UI.
Use Recharts for the Sentiment horizontal bar chart and Frame radar chart. Customize Recharts tooltips to look like dark-mode Shadcn popovers.
The layout must feel like a cross between a Bloomberg Terminal and Ground News: Data-dense, highly analytical, objective, and authoritative.
Side-by-side publisher perspectives should use a strict grid with border-collapse or 1px subtle borders to look like a connected matrix.
Do NOT use native HTML <select> or <input type='date'>. Use Shadcn DropdownMenu, Select, and Calendar.
Add 'data-testid' to all buttons, links, form inputs, and interactive charts.
Ensure the fonts 'Chivo', 'IBM Plex Sans', and 'JetBrains Mono' are imported in index.css or via Google Fonts.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Do not converge toward generic 'AI slop' outputs. Use layered design elements with z-index hierarchy, but keep elevation flat (no heavy shadows).
Use 2-3x more spacing on outer layout containers (e.g., p-8 to p-12), but keep data rows tight and compact inside.
NEVER use generic placeholder URLs (like via.placeholder.com). Use the provided image URLs.
Do not center-align text by default. Left-align text, labels, and dense content for maximum readability.
Do not apply 'transition: all'. Use specific transitions (e.g., transition-colors, transition-opacity).
Do not use complete transparent background in headers, overlays, or dropdowns. They MUST have a solid dark background or heavy backdrop-blur.
Use pill-shaped or sharp rectangular buttons. Ensure hover states actively change color (e.g., hover:bg-slate-800).
general_ui_ux_guidelines: Visual Hierarchy: Make sentiment and bias data the most saturated elements on the screen. Backgrounds and text should remain muted.
Data Density: Prioritize keeping multiple perspectives visible above the fold. Use scrollable inner panes if necessary.
Neutrality: The UI must feel objective. Avoid overly playful animations; stick to crisp, instant micro-interactions.
Feedback: Instantly reflect active states on filters and semantic search results to keep the user engaged in the data exploration loop.
